name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl and Sopi operator backend v5.62: fixes operator provisioning returning 502. The invite email was sent with a blocking await and no timeout, so a slow or hung SendGrid call held the HTTP request open until the platform edge timed out and returned 502, even though the operator was created. The email now has a 12s timeout and is sent without blocking the response: the endpoint returns created:true and inviteQueued:true immediately, and the email outcome is logged (with the invite URL on failure). Cumulative over v5.61.
